originalCode:
# Augment Agent — Extended Configuration Personal `~/.augment/` setup replicating **11 rules, 98 skills, 38 agents.** Marketplace plugins adapted: `.claude/` → `.augment/`, hooks → rules, superpowers > ECC priority. ## Target Configuration **● Rules (11):** - Core: caveman-activate, superpowers-priority, session-lifecycle - Code quality: coding-principles, karpathy-guidelines, security-principles - Workflow: agentic-workflow, codegraph-priority, context-md-usage, research-delegation, honest-feedback **● Skills (99):** - **Superpowers (15)**: superpowers-workflow, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, requesting-code-review, receiving-code-review, dispatching-parallel-agents, subagent-driven-development, using-git-worktrees, finishing-a-development-branch, using-superpowers, writing-skills, superpowers-help - **ECC (68)**: ck, deep-research, exa-search, documentation-lookup, tdd-workflow, verification-loop, santa-method, e2e-testing, blueprint, hexagonal-architecture, git-workflow, coding-standards, frontend-patterns, backend-patterns, api-design, postgres-patterns, docker-patterns, claude-devfleet, gan-style-harness, autonomous-agent-harness, dmux-workflows, eval-harness, agent-eval, benchmark, browser-qa, canary-watch, security-review, security-scan, safety-guard, continuous-learning, continuous-learning-v2, codebase-onboarding, workspace-surface-audit, prompt-optimizer, token-budget-advisor, context-budget, skill-comply, repo-scan, + 30 more - **Caveman (7)**: caveman, caveman-commit, caveman-review, caveman-compress, caveman-help, cavecrew, caveman-stats - **Custom/Matt Pocock (7)**: grill-with-docs, improve-codebase-architecture, prototype, to-issues, to-prd, zoom-out, create-adr, create-makefile, create-readme, create-usage - **UI/UX (1)**: ui-ux-pro-max **● Agents (38):** - **Superpowers (1)**: code-reviewer - **ECC (37)**: explore, plan, general-purpose, research, code, validate, architect, build-error-resolver, chief-of-staff, cpp-build-resolver, cpp-reviewer, csharp-reviewer, dart-build-resolver, database-reviewer, doc-updater, docs-lookup, e2e-runner, flutter-reviewer, gan-evaluator, gan-generator, gan-planner, go-build-resolver, go-reviewer, harness-optimizer, healthcare-reviewer, java-build-resolver, java-reviewer, kotlin-build-resolver, kotlin-reviewer, loop-operator, opensource-forker, opensource-packager, opensource-sanitizer, performance-optimizer, planner, python-reviewer, pytorch-build-resolver, refactor-cleaner, rust-build-resolver, rust-reviewer, security-reviewer, tdd-guide, typescript-reviewer **● MCP Servers (3):** - **codegraph** — symbol search, dependency graphs, impact analysis - **Context7** — up-to-date library documentation - **sequential-thinking** — extended thinking for complex problems --- ## What's in This Repo | Directory | What | In Git? | |-----------|------|---------| | `skills/superpowers/` | **Superpowers** — 14 workflow skills (primary framework) | [OK] | | `skills/ecc/` | **Everything Claude Code** — 67 general-purpose skills (auto-loaded) | [OK] | | `skills/ui-ux-pro-max/` | **UI/UX Pro Max** — searchable design database (67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings) | [OK] | | `skills/caveman*/` | **Caveman** — token compression (caveman, commit, review, compress, help) | [OK] | | `skills/karpathy-guidelines/` | **Karpathy Guidelines** — reduce common LLM coding mistakes (4 core principles) | [OK] | | `skill-library/ecc/` | **Optional ECC skills** — 88 domain/language-specific skills (NOT auto-loaded) | [X] Gitignored | | `agents/` | 38 sub-agents (reviewers, build resolvers, domain specialists) | [OK] | | `rules/` | Global rules loaded into every session | [OK] | | `settings.json` | Model, indexing, and MCP server config | [OK] | | `plugins/marketplaces/` | Original plugin git repos (clone separately per INSTALL.md) | [X] Gitignored | | `.codegraph/` | CodeGraph index (regenerate per machine) | [X] Gitignored | | `ck/` | Context Keeper project registry + contexts | [X] Gitignored | | `projects/` | Native memory directories | [X] Gitignored | | `sessions/` | Session state files | [X] Gitignored | | `checkpoint-documents/` | File edit checkpoints | [X] Gitignored | | `task-storage/` | Task list persistence | [X] Gitignored | | `untruncated/` | View-range cache | [X] Gitignored | **Shared (git):** - Skills, agents, rules - settings.json (model + MCP, no auth) - Docs **Local only (regenerate):** - Runtime (sessions, checkpoints, tasks) - Indexes (codegraph, untruncated, skill-library) - Machine paths (ck, native memory) - Marketplace repos (clone separately) **Adaptations from Claude Code:** - `~/.claude/` → `~/.augment/` - Hooks → rule automation (`session-lifecycle.md`) - `continuous-learning` runs inline (no transcript dependency) - Superpowers > ECC (`superpowers-priority.md`) --- ## Prerequisites Node.js ≥18 · Python 3.8+ · npm ≥9 · Git · macOS/Linux (WSL for Windows) ```bash node --version && python3 --version sudo npm install -g @colbymchenry/codegraph ``` --- ## Installation ### Fresh Clone (New Machine) ```bash # 1. Clone repo git clone ~/.augment && cd ~/.augment # 2. Clone marketplace plugins mkdir -p plugins/marketplaces && cd plugins/marketplaces git clone https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git superpowers-dev git clone https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code.git git clone https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.git git clone https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman.git # Custom/Matt Pocock skills — add your repo or copy manually cd ~/.augment # 3. Install CodeGraph sudo npm install -g @colbymchenry/codegraph cd ~/.augment && codegraph init -i # 4. Copy skills & agents (see Detailed Setup below for full commands) # 5. Adapt paths find skills agents -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.json" \) \ -exec sed -i '' 's|~/.claude/|~/.augment/|g; s|/.claude/|/.augment/|g' {} + # 6. Verify echo "Rules: $(ls rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)" echo "Skills: $(find skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)" echo "Agents: $(find agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)" # 7. Update settings.json — remove auth fields, keep only indexingAllowDirs + mcpServers ``` **WARNING: `settings.json` AUTH** NO auth/login/token fields from other machines. Each Augment manages auth independently. **Keep:** `indexingAllowDirs`, `mcpServers` **Drop:** auth/token fields, machine-specific paths outside `~/.augment` ### Existing Setup (Updates) ```bash cd ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/superpowers-dev && git pull origin main cd ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/everything-claude-code && git pull origin main cd ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/ui-ux-pro-max-skill && git pull origin main cd ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/caveman && git pull origin main # If using custom repo: cd ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/custom && git pull ``` Then re-run copy commands from Detailed Setup for updated files. ### Detailed Setup (Tasks 2-12)
Task 2: Superpowers (14 skills, 1 agent) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/superpowers ~/.augment/agents/superpowers cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/superpowers-dev/skills/* ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/ cp ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/superpowers-dev/agents/*.md ~/.augment/agents/superpowers/ chmod +x ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/brainstorming/scripts/*.sh ``` Skip hooks/ and commands/ (Claude Code/Cursor only).
Task 3: ECC (68 skills, 37 agents — skip code-reviewer.md) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/agents/ecc ~/.augment/skills/ecc for f in ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/everything-claude-code/agents/*.md; do name=$(basename "$f") [ "$name" != "code-reviewer.md" ] && cp "$f" ~/.augment/agents/ecc/"$name" done for d in ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/everything-claude-code/skills/*/; do cp -r "$d" ~/.augment/skills/ecc/$(basename "$d") done ``` NO `code-reviewer.md` — conflicts with superpowers.
Task 4: UI/UX Pro Max (1 skill) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/src/ui-ux-pro-max/{data,scripts} ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/ # Generate SKILL.md with frontmatter TEMPLATE=~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/src/ui-ux-pro-max/templates/base/skill-content.md sed -e 's|{{TITLE}}|ui-ux-pro-max|g' \ -e 's|{{DESCRIPTION}}|Comprehensive design guide for web and mobile applications.|g' \ -e 's|{{QUICK_REFERENCE}}||g' \ -e 's|skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py|.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py|g' \ "$TEMPLATE" > ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md # Add YAML frontmatter SKILL_FILE=~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md echo "--- name: ui-ux-pro-max description: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence with 67 styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types. origin: ui-ux-pro-max-skill --- " | cat - "$SKILL_FILE" > /tmp/skill_tmp && mv /tmp/skill_tmp "$SKILL_FILE" # Fix stale paths sed -i '' -e 's|`ui-reasoning.csv`|`data/ui-reasoning.csv`|g' \ -e 's|`src/ui-ux-pro-max/data/icons.csv`|`data/icons.csv`|g' \ ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md ``` Verify: `python3 ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "fintech" --domain style -n 1`
Task 5: Caveman + Custom (7 + 7 skills) **Caveman:** ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/caveman ~/.augment/agents/skills cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/caveman/skills/* ~/.augment/skills/ cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/caveman/agents/skills/* ~/.augment/agents/skills/ ``` **Custom/Matt Pocock** — add your repo or copy manually to `~/.augment/skills/custom/` Commands: `/caveman [lite|full|ultra]`, `/caveman-commit`, `/caveman-review`, `/caveman:compress `, `/caveman-stats`
Task 6: Rules (11 total — already in git) All at `~/.augment/rules/` — no install needed for fresh clone. **Core:** caveman-activate, superpowers-priority, session-lifecycle **Code quality:** coding-principles, karpathy-guidelines, security-principles **Workflow:** agentic-workflow, codegraph-priority, context-md-usage, research-delegation, honest-feedback **Do NOT install ECC rules globally** — only per-repo as Auto workspace rules.
Task 7: settings.json ```json { "indexingAllowDirs": ["/Users/YourUsername/Downloads", "/Users/YourUsername/.augment"], "mcpServers": { "codegraph": { "command": "codegraph", "args": ["serve", "--mcp"] }, "Context7": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@upstash/context7-mcp"] }, "sequential-thinking": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking"] } } } ``` NO auth/login/model fields — Augment manages auth. Replace `/Users/YourUsername` with actual home.
Task 8: Verify Installation ```bash echo "=== INVENTORY CHECK ===" echo "Rules: $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)" echo "Superpowers skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/* | wc -l) (expect 14)" echo "Superpowers agents: $(ls ~/.augment/agents/superpowers/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 1)" echo "ECC skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/ecc/* | wc -l) (expect 68)" echo "ECC agents: $(ls ~/.augment/agents/ecc/*.md | wc -l) (expect 37)" echo "Caveman skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/caveman* ~/.augment/agents/skills/cavecrew* 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 7)" echo "Custom skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/custom/* 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 7)" echo "UI/UX: $([ -f ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md ] && echo 1 || echo 0) (expect 1)" echo "" echo "TOTAL SKILLS: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)" echo "TOTAL AGENTS: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)" echo "" echo "=== INTEGRITY ===" [ -f ~/.augment/agents/ecc/code-reviewer.md ] && echo "[X] ECC code-reviewer exists" || echo "[OK] No ECC code-reviewer" [ -f ~/.augment/rules/superpowers-priority.md ] && echo "[OK] Priority rule exists" || echo "[X] Priority rule missing" grep -q '"instructions"' ~/.augment/settings.json && echo "[X] settings.json has unsupported instructions key" || echo "[OK] settings.json clean" ```
Task 9-12: Path Adaptation, CodeGraph, Session Lifecycle **Task 9: Check for updates** — after `git pull`, diff plugin files against installed copies, re-run copy commands for changed files. **Task 10: Adapt `.claude/` → `.augment/`** — already done if using this repo. For fresh upstream installs: ```bash find ~/.augment/skills ~/.augment/agents -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.json" \) \ -exec sed -i '' 's|~/.claude/|~/.augment/|g; s|/.claude/|/.augment/|g' {} + ``` **Task 11: CodeGraph MCP** — already installed in prerequisites. Test: `codegraph_status`, `codegraph_search query="AuthService"` **Task 12: Session lifecycle** — `~/.augment/rules/session-lifecycle.md` handles auto-resume, auto-save, context pressure. See [Context Keeper](#context-keeper-ck) below.
--- ## Verification After install: ```bash echo "Rules: $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)" echo "Skills: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)" echo "Agents: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)" ``` All checks pass → installation complete. --- ## Usage **Session lifecycle (automated):** ``` Start → auto-resume or register (/ck:init) ↓ Work → agent matches skills ↓ Git commit → auto-save checkpoint (/ck:save) ↓ "bye" → save + continuous-learning "handoff" → save + portable markdown (/ck:handoff) ↓ Next session → briefing (where left off) ``` Zero manual commands for normal workflow. **Caveman mode:** `/caveman full` — 75% token reduction, auto-active **CodeGraph:** `codegraph_search`, `codegraph_explore`, `codegraph_impact` **Context7:** Auto-triggers for library/framework questions **Deep research:** Triggers on "research X", "state of X" — delegates to parallel sub-agents --- ## Context Keeper (ck) Central storage at `~/.augment/ck/`: ``` ck/ ├── projects.json ← maps project paths → {name, contextDir, lastUpdated} ├── current-session.json ← active session tracking └── contexts// ├── context.json ← source of truth (v2 structured JSON) └── CONTEXT.md ← generated readable view ``` **Handoff mode:** `/ck:handoff [focus]` creates portable markdown in project root for agent transfer (Cursor/Claude Desktop/teammate). Auto-redacts secrets. Add to `.gitignore`: `ck-handoff-*.md` **Troubleshooting:** | Error | Fix | |-------|-----| | `This directory is not registered` | Run `/ck:init` or update `projects.json` key to match `PWD` | | `contextDir` missing | Add `"contextDir": ""` to `projects.json` entry | | Empty resume data | Convert to v2 schema or re-register with `/ck:init` | --- ## Skill Library (Optional) 88 domain/language-specific ECC skills in `skill-library/ecc/` — NOT auto-loaded (context reduction). **Use:** `cp -r ~/.augment/skill-library/ecc/ /.augment/skills/` **Categories:** Languages (Python, Go, Rust, C++, C#, Java, Kotlin, Perl) · Frameworks (Django, Laravel, Spring Boot, Flutter, SwiftUI, Compose, Next.js, Nuxt, Bun) · Domains (Healthcare, Supply Chain, ClickHouse) · Content (article, brand voice, X API) · Media (fal.ai, Remotion, Manim, VideoDB) · Business (investor materials, billing ops) · Integrations (Jira, Google Workspace, Nutrient) · Other (Claude API, OpenClaw, open-source pipeline) --- ## Troubleshooting **Skills not loading:** - Verify `SKILL.md` exists in skill directory - Check YAML frontmatter has `name` and `description` - Restart Augment after adding skills **Rules not working:** - Rules are flat files: `rules/coding-style.md` ✓, `rules/common/coding-style.md` ✗ - Restart Augment after adding rules **CodeGraph not working:** - Run `codegraph init -i` in `~/.augment` - Verify `codegraph_status` returns index info **ck not resuming:** - Check `~/.augment/ck/projects.json` key matches workspace `PWD` - Verify `contextDir` field exists in project entry - Re-register: `/ck:init` --- ## Reference **Docs:** - `CATALOG.md` — searchable skill/agent reference - Plugin repos: superpowers, everything-claude-code, ui-ux-pro-max-skill, caveman **MCP Servers:** - **codegraph** — symbol search, dependency graphs, impact analysis - **Context7** — up-to-date library/framework docs (free) - **sequential-thinking** — extended thinking for complex problems (free) Add paid servers (Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai) to `settings.json` when API keys available.

Task 2: Superpowers (14 skills, 1 agent) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/superpowers ~/.augment/agents/superpowers cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/superpowers-dev/skills/* ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/ cp ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/superpowers-dev/agents/*.md ~/.augment/agents/superpowers/ chmod +x ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/brainstorming/scripts/*.sh ``` Skip hooks/ and commands/ (Claude Code/Cursor only).
Task 3: ECC (68 skills, 37 agents — skip code-reviewer.md) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/agents/ecc ~/.augment/skills/ecc for f in ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/everything-claude-code/agents/*.md; do name=$(basename "$f") [ "$name" != "code-reviewer.md" ] && cp "$f" ~/.augment/agents/ecc/"$name" done for d in ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/everything-claude-code/skills/*/; do cp -r "$d" ~/.augment/skills/ecc/$(basename "$d") done ``` NO `code-reviewer.md` — conflicts with superpowers.
Task 4: UI/UX Pro Max (1 skill) ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/src/ui-ux-pro-max/{data,scripts} ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/ # Generate SKILL.md with frontmatter TEMPLATE=~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/src/ui-ux-pro-max/templates/base/skill-content.md sed -e 's|{{TITLE}}|ui-ux-pro-max|g' \ -e 's|{{DESCRIPTION}}|Comprehensive design guide for web and mobile applications.|g' \ -e 's|{{QUICK_REFERENCE}}||g' \ -e 's|skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py|.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py|g' \ "$TEMPLATE" > ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md # Add YAML frontmatter SKILL_FILE=~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md echo "--- name: ui-ux-pro-max description: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence with 67 styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types. origin: ui-ux-pro-max-skill --- " | cat - "$SKILL_FILE" > /tmp/skill_tmp && mv /tmp/skill_tmp "$SKILL_FILE" # Fix stale paths sed -i '' -e 's|`ui-reasoning.csv`|`data/ui-reasoning.csv`|g' \ -e 's|`src/ui-ux-pro-max/data/icons.csv`|`data/icons.csv`|g' \ ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md ``` Verify: `python3 ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "fintech" --domain style -n 1`
Task 5: Caveman + Custom (7 + 7 skills) **Caveman:** ```bash mkdir -p ~/.augment/skills/caveman ~/.augment/agents/skills cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/caveman/skills/* ~/.augment/skills/ cp -r ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces/caveman/agents/skills/* ~/.augment/agents/skills/ ``` **Custom/Matt Pocock** — add your repo or copy manually to `~/.augment/skills/custom/` Commands: `/caveman [lite|full|ultra]`, `/caveman-commit`, `/caveman-review`, `/caveman:compress `, `/caveman-stats`
Task 6: Rules (11 total — already in git) All at `~/.augment/rules/` — no install needed for fresh clone. **Core:** caveman-activate, superpowers-priority, session-lifecycle **Code quality:** coding-principles, karpathy-guidelines, security-principles **Workflow:** agentic-workflow, codegraph-priority, context-md-usage, research-delegation, honest-feedback **Do NOT install ECC rules globally** — only per-repo as Auto workspace rules.
Task 7: settings.json ```json { "indexingAllowDirs": ["/Users/YourUsername/Downloads", "/Users/YourUsername/.augment"], "mcpServers": { "codegraph": { "command": "codegraph", "args": ["serve", "--mcp"] }, "Context7": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@upstash/context7-mcp"] }, "sequential-thinking": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking"] } } } ``` NO auth/login/model fields — Augment manages auth. Replace `/Users/YourUsername` with actual home.
Task 8: Verify Installation ```bash echo "=== INVENTORY CHECK ===" echo "Rules: $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)" echo "Superpowers skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/superpowers/* | wc -l) (expect 14)" echo "Superpowers agents: $(ls ~/.augment/agents/superpowers/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 1)" echo "ECC skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/ecc/* | wc -l) (expect 68)" echo "ECC agents: $(ls ~/.augment/agents/ecc/*.md | wc -l) (expect 37)" echo "Caveman skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/caveman* ~/.augment/agents/skills/cavecrew* 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 7)" echo "Custom skills: $(ls -d ~/.augment/skills/custom/* 2>/dev/null | wc -l) (expect 7)" echo "UI/UX: $([ -f ~/.augment/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md ] && echo 1 || echo 0) (expect 1)" echo "" echo "TOTAL SKILLS: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)" echo "TOTAL AGENTS: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)" echo "" echo "=== INTEGRITY ===" [ -f ~/.augment/agents/ecc/code-reviewer.md ] && echo "[X] ECC code-reviewer exists" || echo "[OK] No ECC code-reviewer" [ -f ~/.augment/rules/superpowers-priority.md ] && echo "[OK] Priority rule exists" || echo "[X] Priority rule missing" grep -q '"instructions"' ~/.augment/settings.json && echo "[X] settings.json has unsupported instructions key" || echo "[OK] settings.json clean" ```
Task 9-12: Path Adaptation, CodeGraph, Session Lifecycle **Task 9: Check for updates** — after `git pull`, diff plugin files against installed copies, re-run copy commands for changed files. **Task 10: Adapt `.claude/` → `.augment/`** — already done if using this repo. For fresh upstream installs: ```bash find ~/.augment/skills ~/.augment/agents -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.json" \) \ -exec sed -i '' 's|~/.claude/|~/.augment/|g; s|/.claude/|/.augment/|g' {} + ``` **Task 11: CodeGraph MCP** — already installed in prerequisites. Test: `codegraph_status`, `codegraph_search query="AuthService"` **Task 12: Session lifecycle** — `~/.augment/rules/session-lifecycle.md` handles auto-resume, auto-save, context pressure. See [Context Keeper](#context-keeper-ck) below.
--- ## Verification After install: ```bash echo "Rules: $(ls ~/.augment/rules/*.md | wc -l) (expect 11)" echo "Skills: $(find ~/.augment/skills -name 'SKILL.md' | wc -l) (expect 98)" echo "Agents: $(find ~/.augment/agents -name '*.md' | wc -l) (expect 38)" ``` All checks pass → installation complete. --- ## Usage **Session lifecycle (automated):** ``` Start → auto-resume or register (/ck:init) ↓ Work → agent matches skills ↓ Git commit → auto-save checkpoint (/ck:save) ↓ "bye" → save + continuous-learning "handoff" → save + portable markdown (/ck:handoff) ↓ Next session → briefing (where left off) ``` Zero manual commands for normal workflow. **Caveman mode:** `/caveman full` — 75% token reduction, auto-active **CodeGraph:** `codegraph_search`, `codegraph_explore`, `codegraph_impact` **Context7:** Auto-triggers for library/framework questions **Deep research:** Triggers on "research X", "state of X" — delegates to parallel sub-agents --- ## Context Keeper (ck) Central storage at `~/.augment/ck/`: ``` ck/ ├── projects.json ← maps project paths → {name, contextDir, lastUpdated} ├── current-session.json ← active session tracking └── contexts// ├── context.json ← source of truth (v2 structured JSON) └── CONTEXT.md ← generated readable view ``` **Handoff mode:** `/ck:handoff [focus]` creates portable markdown in project root for agent transfer (Cursor/Claude Desktop/teammate). Auto-redacts secrets. Add to `.gitignore`: `ck-handoff-*.md` **Troubleshooting:** | Error | Fix | |-------|-----| | `This directory is not registered` | Run `/ck:init` or update `projects.json` key to match `PWD` | | `contextDir` missing | Add `"contextDir": ""` to `projects.json` entry | | Empty resume data | Convert to v2 schema or re-register with `/ck:init` | --- ## Skill Library (Optional) 88 domain/language-specific ECC skills in `skill-library/ecc/` — NOT auto-loaded (context reduction). **Use:** `cp -r ~/.augment/skill-library/ecc/ /.augment/skills/` **Categories:** Languages (Python, Go, Rust, C++, C#, Java, Kotlin, Perl) · Frameworks (Django, Laravel, Spring Boot, Flutter, SwiftUI, Compose, Next.js, Nuxt, Bun) · Domains (Healthcare, Supply Chain, ClickHouse) · Content (article, brand voice, X API) · Media (fal.ai, Remotion, Manim, VideoDB) · Business (investor materials, billing ops) · Integrations (Jira, Google Workspace, Nutrient) · Other (Claude API, OpenClaw, open-source pipeline) --- ## Troubleshooting **Skills not loading:** - Verify `SKILL.md` exists in skill directory - Check YAML frontmatter has `name` and `description` - Restart Augment after adding skills **Rules not working:** - Rules are flat files: `rules/coding-style.md` ✓, `rules/common/coding-style.md` ✗ - Restart Augment after adding rules **CodeGraph not working:** - Run `codegraph init -i` in `~/.augment` - Verify `codegraph_status` returns index info **ck not resuming:** - Check `~/.augment/ck/projects.json` key matches workspace `PWD` - Verify `contextDir` field exists in project entry - Re-register: `/ck:init` --- ## Reference **Docs:** - `CATALOG.md` — searchable skill/agent reference - Plugin repos: superpowers, everything-claude-code, ui-ux-pro-max-skill, caveman **MCP Servers:** - **codegraph** — symbol search, dependency graphs, impact analysis - **Context7** — up-to-date library/framework docs (free) - **sequential-thinking** — extended thinking for complex problems (free) Add paid servers (Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai) to `settings.json` when API keys available.
